title: Convert to Subitem feature available even if no subitems exist
excerpt: When trying to convert an item into a subitem, unless there is an existing subitem on the board, it will not allow the option to do so.

posts.author: jharness (Josh Harness)
posts.cookedHtml: When trying to convert an item into a subitem, unless there is an existing subitem on the board, it will not allow the option to do so.
